HGSS.678.0001:
I’d like to have another Pokémon battle
with you sometime. Can we trade\r
phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.678.0004:
I’d like to have another Pokémon battle
with you sometime. Can we trade\r
phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.678.0005:
Even though you’re nearby, talking on
the phone makes you seem far away.\f
Don’t be shy. Why not come talk
to me in person?
HGSS.678.0006:
There are some people out there who
say, “You don’t need to give Bait to\r
your caught Pokémon,” but\r
I’m different.\f
My [0100,000A,0000] does a great job.\f
So I feed it delicious things, brush it,
pet it, show it affection, and just\r
cherish it!
HGSS.678.0007:
Yesterday I went fishing and knocked
out a [0100,000B,0000]!\f
I know that if I go to the mountains, or
the forest, or the grassland, or the\r
caves, or any place like that,\r
I could find all kinds of Pokémon.\f
But I just really like Pokémon like
[0100,000B,0000], you know...
HGSS.678.0008:
The biggest Pokémon is always the one
you almost caught, you know?\f
Just the other day, I had almost
caught a [0100,000B,0000] when it\r
ran away! I was so disappointed!\f
When you’re fishing, don’t have any
regrets! Fish with all your might!\r
Hey! Fight!
HGSS.678.0009:
I’m getting sick of fishing. I’d rather
have a Pokémon battle with you!\f
Hey! I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.678.0010:
Hello? We made plans to meet on
[0104,0003,0000] for a battle, right?\r
Hey! Hurry up and get here.
HGSS.678.0011:
The real draw of fishing is that you
never know what you’ll catch until you\r
actually pull it up out of the water.\f
Someday maybe I’ll pull up on the
fishing Rod and there will be a\r
legendary Pokémon on the other end of\r
my line...\f
Yeah, right. The chances of that
happening are basically zero.\f
For example, RAIKOU and the others, as
they’re skipping around all over the\r
place, maybe their feet would slip and\r
they’d land in the sea...\f
What do you think, could I accidentally
catch RAIKOU while fishing?\f
...How silly, right?
